# Code of Conduct

Lattices should be a welcoming project for people building local-first, agent-friendly developer
tools.

## Expected Behavior

- Be respectful and constructive.
- Assume good intent while still naming technical risks clearly.
- Keep criticism focused on code, docs, behavior, and design tradeoffs.
- Make room for newcomers and people with different levels of macOS, Swift, TypeScript, tmux, or AI
  tooling experience.

## Unacceptable Behavior

- Harassment, intimidation, or personal attacks.
- Demeaning language about a person or group.
- Publishing private information without permission.
- Repeatedly derailing technical discussion after maintainers ask you to stop.

## Enforcement

Maintainers may remove comments, close issues or pull requests, block users, or take other
reasonable action to keep the project healthy.

Report concerns privately to <arach@tchoupani.com>.
